key_observations: NOAA Storm Events records describe large hail and severe wind impacts across Tarrant County during the May 4, 2023 North Texas outbreak.
Texas emergency and weather reporting tie roof and exterior damage patterns in Tarrant County to the same hail-producing storm system.
